chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P.No.D-1657 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.19344/2025 2. For order on CMA No.19345/2025 3. For hearing of CMA No.15063/2024 4. For hearing of CMA No.13958/2024 5. For hearing of CMA No.9132/2024 6. For hearing of CMA No.7547/2024 7. For hearing of CMA No.8680/2024 8. For hearing of CMA No.7546/2024 9. For hearing of main case 13.10.2025 Mr. Adil Lakhani, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Nawaz Khuhawar, advocate for respondent No.5 Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General --------- Learned counsel for the petitioner has challenged illegal construction and sought demolition of such illegal construction. The petitioner, if so advised, shall file application through the Smart Complaint Redressal Management System (SCRMS) of SBCA and in the event such application is filed, SBCA shall deal with the same in accordance with its own SOPs. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director General, SBCA, for information. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
